label: Ashlight Keeper's Quarters
description: Ashlight Keeper's Quarters serves as the canteen’s private residence, walled in riveted sheet-metal and insulated against Vespera Tertius’ ash-cold drafts. A narrow cot and built-in lockers sit beneath violet-glass sconces that stain the room in bruise-colored light, while the floor is set with drain grates matching the taproom’s washdown design. Copper grounding straps and hanging chains run along the ceiling baffles, channeling the endemic electrostatic charge into the basalt foundation. The only aperture is a gasketed service hatch and a shuttered vent, both sealed to keep out grit and vox-hiss.
